title: ReZero: Return By Death
description:
The not so popular TikTok meme is now in game!

Instant Respawn + Play Sound. Thats all.
Just wanted to learn a bit of Java and Minecraft Modding.
body:
The not so popular TikTok meme is now in game!

Instant Respawn + Play Sound. Thats all.
